title: Tunisian Fish Tagine
description: A hearty, flavorful North African-inspired stew made with tender fish and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add fish and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add Tunisian spice blend, tomatoes, fish broth, honey, and lemon juice.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until fish is cooked through and sauce has thickened, about 10-15 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika and parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
